description_long: A rectangular wooden planter box sits on a concrete sidewalk, filled with lush green foliage and several flowering plants. The box is weathered, with visible grain and some discoloration, and is reinforced at the corners with vertical wooden posts. The plants inside are dense, with broad, ovate leaves and a few visible flowers peeking through the greenery. The surrounding ground includes patches of concrete and some soil, with a slight overgrowth spilling over the edges of the planter. The overall scene suggests a well-established urban flower bed, possibly maintained as part of a streetscape or community garden.
description: A weathered wooden planter box filled with dense green foliage and flowering plants, set on a concrete sidewalk.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rectangular planter box with dense green foliage spilling over the edge and a clear view of the wooden structure.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the lushness of the plants, with foliage obscuring much of the box and a wider spread of leaves visible.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the thickest concentration of greenery, with the planter box partially hidden by overgrown plants.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the planter box and sidewalk, with foliage extending outward and a clear look at the box's corner post.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial configuration, with some overlapping and forming a whorled pattern typical of many urban flowering plants.
